items.title: S02E01 - Cold Cuts
items.summary: Cost-cutting measures result in the hospital's heating system being turned down - but Sheila's temperature is sent soaring by the discovery that one of her favourite workers has been given the sack.

infolabels.title: Cold Cuts
infolabels.plot: Cost-cutting measures result in the hospital's heating system being turned down - but Sheila's temperature is sent soaring by the discovery that one of her favourite workers has been given the sack.

items.title: S02E02 - The Copeland Affair
items.summary: Sheila clashes with Dr Haslam, whose slow working methods are having a knock-on effect, causing her cases to start backing up.

infolabels.title: The Copeland Affair
infolabels.plot: Sheila clashes with Dr Haslam, whose slow working methods are having a knock-on effect, causing her cases to start backing up.

items.title: S02E03 - Educating Daniel
items.summary: Daniel is thrown out of boarding school for showing too much interest in the opposite sex, so Sheila enlists Jonathan to give him a man-to-man talk, hoping a little homespun wisdom will help improve his behaviour.

infolabels.title: Educating Daniel
infolabels.plot: Daniel is thrown out of boarding school for showing too much interest in the opposite sex, so Sheila enlists Jonathan to give him a man-to-man talk, hoping a little homespun wisdom will help improve his behaviour.

items.title: S02E04 - Doubting Thomas
items.summary: A Registrar makes a mistake during an operation putting up the question of what the consultants duties?

infolabels.title: Doubting Thomas
infolabels.plot: A Registrar makes a mistake during an operation putting up the question of what the consultants duties?

items.title: S02E05 - The Phone Call
items.summary: Sheila is expecting an urgent phone call from her soon-to-be ex-husband Remo - and woe betide anyone who uses the phone in the meantime.

infolabels.title: The Phone Call
infolabels.plot: Sheila is expecting an urgent phone call from her soon-to-be ex-husband Remo - and woe betide anyone who uses the phone in the meantime.

items.title: S02E06 - The Garden Party
items.summary: Sheila is invited to a royal garden party at Buckingham Palace. But the main question is, who shall accompany her?

infolabels.plot: Sheila is invited to a royal garden party at Buckingham Palace. But the main question is, who shall accompany her?

items.title: S02E07 - Something In The Air
items.summary: Jonathan is branded a male chauvinist when he expresses the opinion that Dr Field's bride-to-be should be a housewife.

infolabels.title: Something In The Air
infolabels.plot: Jonathan is branded a male chauvinist when he expresses the opinion that Dr Field's bride-to-be should be a housewife.

items.title: S03E01 - The Holiday Job

infolabels.plot: Sheila's son Daniel lands a holiday job at the hospital.

items.summary: Sister Patching spots a cockroach in Sheila's operating theatre.

items.title: S03E03 - Making News
items.summary: Sheila makes a splash in the news when she sounds off on a television programme about doctors who smoke and drink.

items.title: S03E04 - The Folks On The Hill

items.title: S03E05 - Close To The Edge

infolabels.plot: When Jonathon goes to the dentist, Sheila has to work with Quentin Pierce, whom she considers to be mad.

items.title: S03E07 - The Rover's Return
items.summary: Sheila gets a visit from her erring husband Remo, plunging her hormones into battle with her principles.

items.title: S04E01 - The Mating Game
items.summary: Sheila is in high spirits now that her divorce is through. Jonathan, wondering if life is passing him by, decides to make a move in her direction.

infolabels.title: The Mating Game
infolabels.plot: Sheila is in high spirits now that her divorce is through. Jonathan, wondering if life is passing him by, decides to make a move in her direction.

items.title: S04E02 - Joyce's Little Turn
items.summary: Alarm bells start ringing among the staff at Gillies Hospital when Jonathan threatens to sing in the Student's Revue. And after some drugs go missing, there's a suspicion that Joyce be hiding a secret.

infolabels.title: Joyce's Little Turn
infolabels.plot: Alarm bells start ringing among the staff at Gillies Hospital when Jonathan threatens to sing in the Student's Revue. And after some drugs go missing, there's a suspicion that Joyce be hiding a secret.

items.title: S04E03 - The Son Also Rises
